tracks.meaning: a platform or raised area where actors perform in front of an audience
a step or phase in a process or sequence of events
a period of development or a point in a sequence of time
a distinct phase in the development or life cycle of an organism
a level of severity or advancement of a disease, particularly in cancer classification
a platform or setting for showcasing or promoting a product, idea, or person
to arrange or organize something in stages or phases over time
a stopping point or place along a journey or route
a section or unit of a rocket or spacecraft that can be separated during flight
to create a public display or demonstration of something, often for effect or impact
a temporary military camp or supply depot used as a base of operations
